capacity_dimensions.name: domain_expertise
capacity_dimensions.rationale: The target task is a simple sorting function with known expected behavior.

capacity_dimensions.name: test_coverage
capacity_dimensions.rationale: The initial test suite covers syntax, contract, runtime behavior, and CLI return codes.

capacity_dimensions.name: replay_support
capacity_dimensions.rationale: Replay design exists, but the replay capsule is not yet independently reproduced.

capacity_dimensions.name: historical_calibration
capacity_dimensions.rationale: The benchmark has not yet accumulated calibration data across trials.

demand_dimensions.name: semantic_difficulty
demand_dimensions.rationale: The task semantics are narrow and well defined.

demand_dimensions.name: security_sensitivity
demand_dimensions.rationale: The task involves generated code, so sandboxing and preflight checks matter.

demand_dimensions.name: reproducibility_burden
demand_dimensions.rationale: Local reproduction is feasible, but witness reproduction is not complete.

demand_dimensions.name: authority_impact
demand_dimensions.rationale: The patch is limited to an ephemeral workspace and cannot modify the base repo.
